title: cheilanthes christii
intro: Cheilanthes christii, also known as Christ's lip fern, is a species of fern in the family wood-sorrels (Cheilanthes). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cheilanthes christii are believed to include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as acting as an astringent to treat various skin conditions. Cheilanthes christii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its effectiveness has not been extensively scientifically studied.
